# Email E-Discovery — Automated Forensic Analysis Report

> **Sample output.** This is a sanitized example of what `analyze.py` produces. All names, emails, paths, and counts are synthetic placeholders. The real tool produces a plain-text report; this Markdown version is provided for repo readability.

**Source database:** `/path/to/sample_case.db`
**Generated by:** `analyze.py`

---

## 1. Corpus Overview

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Total messages | 1,000 |
| Messages with attachments | 500 (50.0%) |
| Total attachments extracted | 2,000 |
| Unique senders | 150 |
| Folders represented | 10 |
| Average body size | 1,500 bytes |
| Largest body size | 15,000 bytes |
